content.explanation:
**Passive Voice Part 1 — Basic Passive Structures:**

**Active Voice:** Subject → करता है
🇮🇳 रोहन ने चाय बनाई।
🇬🇧 Rohan **made** tea. (Active)

**Passive Voice:** Subject → होता है (subject receives the action)
🇮🇳 चाय बनाई गई।
🇬🇧 Tea **was made** (by Rohan). (Passive)

**Why use Passive?**
• जब doer (agent) unknown हो: "The window was broken."
• जब action ज़्यादा important हो than doer: "The report has been submitted."
• Formal/academic writing में

**Passive Formula:**
Subject + **be verb** (correct form) + **V3** (past participle)

| Tense | Active | Passive |
|-------|--------|---------|
| Simple Present | She writes letters. | Letters **are written**. |
| Simple Past | He broke the vase. | The vase **was broken**. |
| Simple Future | They will complete it. | It **will be completed**. |
| Present Perfect | She has sent the email. | The email **has been sent**. |
rules: Passive = Object of active → Subject of passive
Passive formula: Subject + be (correct form) + V3
Active object becomes passive subject; Active subject becomes "by + agent" (optional)
Simple Future Passive: will be + V3
Present Perfect Passive: has/have been + V3
content.memoryTrick:
**PASSIVE = BE + V3** 🔄
জब Active object passive subject बनता है:
• Is/Am/Are + V3 (Present)
• Was/Were + V3 (Past)
• Will be + V3 (Future)
• Has/Have been + V3 (Perfect)

examples.hindi: यह बिल्डिंग 1990 में बनाई गई थी।
काम कल तक complete किया जाएगा।
examples.english: The work will be completed by tomorrow.
This book was written by Premchand.

mistakes.wrong: The letter is write by her.
mistakes.correct: The letter is written by her.

speakingTips: Office में: 'The meeting has been rescheduled.' / 'Your request is being processed.'
News style: 'Three people were injured in the accident.'
Formal emails: 'The attached document should be reviewed and approved.'

vocabulary.example: The cake was baked by the chef (= agent).
The plan was approved by the manager.
This product is manufactured in India.
The package will be delivered tomorrow.

practice.hindi: यहाँ हिंदी बोली जाती है।
practice.english: Hindi is spoken here.

practice.hindi: यह किताब हर साल पढ़ी जाती है।
practice.english: This book is read every year.

practice.hindi: यहाँ अंग्रेज़ी सिखाई जाती है।
practice.english: English is taught here.

practice.hindi: गेहूँ पंजाब में उगाया जाता है।
practice.english: Wheat is grown in Punjab.

practice.hindi: यह दरवाज़ा हर रात बंद किया जाता है।
practice.english: This door is closed every night.
alternatives: this door is shut every night.

practice.hindi: यह काम बहुत सावधानी से किया जाता है।
practice.english: This work is done very carefully.
alternatives: this task is performed with great care.

practice.hindi: खाना 12 बजे परोसा जाता है।
practice.english: Food is served at 12 o'clock.

practice.hindi: क्या यहाँ अंग्रेज़ी बोली जाती है?
practice.english: Is English spoken here?

practice.hindi: पैसे हर महीने बैंक में जमा किए जाते हैं।
practice.english: Money is deposited in the bank every month.
alternatives: money is put into the bank monthly.

practice.hindi: परीक्षा हर साल आयोजित की जाती है।
practice.english: The exam is conducted every year.

practice.hindi: यह पत्र कल लिखा गया।
practice.english: This letter was written yesterday.

practice.hindi: वह दरवाज़ा तोड़ा गया।
practice.english: That door was broken.

practice.hindi: यह इमारत 1950 में बनाई गई थी।
practice.english: This building was built in 1950.

practice.hindi: चोर को पुलिस ने पकड़ा।
practice.english: The thief was caught by the police.
alternatives: the thief was arrested by police.

practice.hindi: यह गाना एक मशहूर गायक ने गाया।
practice.english: This song was sung by a famous singer.
alternatives: this song was performed by a renowned singer.

practice.hindi: मीटिंग कैंसिल कर दी गई।
practice.english: The meeting was cancelled.

practice.hindi: मेरी साइकिल किसी ने चुरा ली।
practice.english: My bicycle was stolen by someone.

practice.hindi: यह खत पोस्ट में डाला गया।
practice.english: This letter was posted.
alternatives: the letter was sent by post.

practice.hindi: उसे नौकरी से निकाल दिया गया।
practice.english: He was fired from the job.
alternatives: he was dismissed from his post.

practice.hindi: यह निर्णय बोर्ड ने लिया।
practice.english: This decision was taken by the board.
alternatives: this decision was made by the board.

practice.hindi: खेल का मैदान साफ़ किया गया।
practice.english: The playground was cleaned.

practice.hindi: यह किताब शेक्सपियर ने लिखी थी।
practice.english: This book was written by Shakespeare.

practice.hindi: पुरस्कार समारोह में उसे सम्मानित किया गया।
practice.english: He was honored at the award ceremony.
alternatives: he received an award at the ceremony.

practice.hindi: क्या परीक्षा कल ली गई?
practice.english: Was the exam taken yesterday?

practice.hindi: मरीज़ को अस्पताल में भर्ती किया गया।
practice.english: The patient was admitted to the hospital.
